action.reasoning: Observation: Training all 10 tasks at 500k steps took 6.5 hours. 'No episodes completed' is misleading - episodes did complete but buffer reporting was off. Previous eval was 0% success. I have ~3 hours left. Analysis: Need to submit eval immediately to see if 500k steps helped. With limited time, I should focus on the most promising tasks. Decision: Submit eval now with current checkpoints.
